since_last: 48% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +2.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 48% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.09% · BTC -1.45% · Gold +0.67% · Nasdaq100 -1.05%. 48% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +2.11%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +2.11%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.12%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at -7.29%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +4.66%, WDAY +3.98%, SAP +3.39%, DV +3.34%, INTU +3.19%. Laggards: AMAT -7.29%, LRCX -6.62%, INTC -6.54%, MU -6.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.41% at $158.16
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.41% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
